label: Media
description: Components for images, video, audio, avatars, galleries, icons, and file uploads

components.name: MediaShell
components.description: Container shell for media content. Provides consistent padding, background, and border-radius for any nested media component.
components.whenToUse: Use as a wrapper around media components to ensure consistent spacing, background color, and border radius across different page layouts.

props.name: bgColor
props.description: Background color override

props.name: maxW
props.description: Maximum width of the shell in pixels

props.name: px
props.description: Horizontal padding in pixels

props.name: py
props.description: Vertical padding in pixels

props.name: radius
props.description: Border radius

props.name: style
props.description: Custom inline styles

props.name: children
props.description: Child media components to render inside the shell

components.name: ResponsiveVideo
components.description: Responsive video player that maintains aspect ratio and adapts to container width. Supports autoplay, loop, and poster images.
components.whenToUse: Use to embed video content on landing pages, marketing pages, portfolio showcases, or blog posts. Ideal for hero videos, product demos, and media-rich content.

props.name: src
props.description: Video source URL

props.name: poster
props.description: Poster image URL shown before playback

props.name: aspectRatio
props.description: Aspect ratio of the video container

props.name: autoPlay
props.description: Whether the video autoplays on load

props.name: muted
props.description: Whether the video is muted by default

props.name: loop
props.description: Whether the video loops continuously

props.name: controls
props.description: Whether to show playback controls

components.name: AudioEmbed
components.description: Audio player embed with optional title and waveform visualization. Supports standard audio formats.
components.whenToUse: Use to embed audio content such as podcast episodes, music tracks, or audio samples on blog posts, portfolio pages, or dedicated podcast pages.

props.name: src
props.description: Audio source URL

props.name: title
props.description: Title displayed above the audio player

props.name: showWaveform
props.description: Whether to display an audio waveform visualization

components.name: AvatarProfile
components.description: Circular avatar image with initials fallback and optional status badge. Automatically derives initials from the name when no image is provided.
components.whenToUse: Use anywhere a user or profile avatar is needed — team sections, testimonials, comment threads, user profiles, and dashboard headers.

props.name: src
props.description: Avatar image source URL

props.name: name
props.description: Full name used for alt text and initials fallback

props.name: initials
props.description: Custom initials override; auto-derived from name if not provided

props.name: size
props.description: Avatar diameter in pixels

props.name: badge
props.description: Status badge text or indicator (e.g., 'online', 'away')

props.name: borderColor
props.description: Border color around the avatar, defaults to theme accent

components.name: IconGrid
components.description: Grid display of icons with optional labels. Renders a responsive grid of icon items for feature highlights, technology stacks, or partner logos.
components.whenToUse: Use on landing pages to showcase features with icons, display technology stacks, or list partner/client logos in a clean grid layout.

props.name: icons
props.description: Array of icon items: {name, label?}

props.name: columns
props.description: Number of grid columns

props.name: iconSize
props.description: Size of each icon in pixels

components.name: ImageGallery
components.description: Grid image gallery with selection support. Displays images in a responsive grid with optional captions and click-to-select functionality.
components.whenToUse: Use on portfolio pages to showcase work, ecommerce product image grids, or blog posts with multiple images. Supports selection callbacks for interactive galleries.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of gallery items: {id, src, alt?, caption?, width?, height?}

props.name: columns
props.description: Number of grid columns

props.name: gap
props.description: Gap between gallery items in pixels

props.name: onSelect
props.description: Callback fired when a gallery item is selected

components.name: LightboxGallery
components.description: Gallery with fullscreen lightbox overlay. Clicking an image opens it in a modal overlay with navigation between images.
components.whenToUse: Use on portfolio pages or ecommerce product pages where users need to view images at full size. Provides a polished fullscreen viewing experience with next/prev navigation.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of gallery items: {id, src, alt?, caption?, width?, height?}

props.name: columns
props.description: Number of grid columns in the thumbnail view

components.name: MasonryGrid
components.description: Masonry-layout image grid that arranges items in an optimized variable-height layout. Images flow naturally based on their aspect ratios.
components.whenToUse: Use on portfolio pages or blog photo posts where images have varying aspect ratios. Creates a visually dynamic, Pinterest-style layout.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of gallery items: {id, src, alt?, caption?, width?, height?}

props.name: columns
props.description: Number of masonry columns

props.name: gap
props.description: Gap between items in pixels

components.name: PolaroidImage
components.description: Polaroid-style image frame with optional caption and rotation. Renders an image inside a white border frame with a drop shadow, mimicking a physical polaroid photo.
components.whenToUse: Use on portfolio, blog, or about pages for a playful, retro-styled image presentation. Great for personal sites, team pages, or creative showcases.

props.name: src
props.description: Image source URL

props.name: caption
props.description: Caption text displayed below the image

props.name: rotation
props.description: Rotation angle in degrees

props.name: width
props.description: Width of the polaroid frame in pixels

components.name: LottieOrSVG
components.description: Render an SVG illustration or a Lottie JSON animation. Supports both static vector graphics and animated Lottie files with configurable dimensions.
components.whenToUse: Use on landing pages, marketing pages, or about pages to add visual interest with animated illustrations or crisp SVG graphics. Ideal for feature sections and empty states.

props.name: type
props.description: Whether to render an SVG or a Lottie animation

props.name: src
props.description: Source URL for the SVG or Lottie JSON file

props.name: width
props.description: Width of the rendered media in pixels

props.name: height
props.description: Height of the rendered media in pixels

props.name: alt
props.description: Accessible alt text for the media

components.name: ImageCropperUploader
components.description: Image upload widget with built-in crop functionality. Allows users to select an image file, crop it interactively, and upload the result.
components.whenToUse: Use in settings pages, profile edit forms, or any form where users need to upload and crop an image. Ideal for avatar uploads, cover photo editors, and content management.

props.name: onUpload
props.description: Callback fired with the cropped file when upload is confirmed

props.name: accept
props.description: Accepted file types for the file input

props.name: maxSizeMB
props.description: Maximum allowed file size in megabytes

props.name: label
props.description: Label text for the upload button

components.name: MapEmbed
components.description: Embedded map display supporting Google Maps and OpenStreetMap providers. Renders a responsive iframe with configurable coordinates, address, and zoom level.
components.whenToUse: Use on contact pages, restaurant locations, real estate listings, event venues, business directories, or any page that needs to display a physical location.

props.name: address
props.description: Physical address string for the map marker

props.name: lat
props.description: Latitude coordinate for the map center

props.name: lng
props.description: Longitude coordinate for the map center

props.name: zoom
props.description: Map zoom level

props.name: height
props.description: Map container height in pixels

props.name: provider
props.description: Map provider to use

props.name: title
props.description: Optional title displayed above the map

props.name: borderRadius
props.description: Border radius override for the map container
